creator: evfbsd@yandex.ru
text:
pkg-message: You can obtain freepascal source code from:
%%PORTSDIR%%/distfiles/freepascal
It could be extracted to your home directory.

But when installing from packages it is not possible to get %%PORTSDIR%%/distfiles/freepascal :(

Can include freepascal source in a package lazarus or create a package lang/fpc-source?
